languages.text: "Общение с {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинными духами{/g} — забота магоса Экзальта-117, и вам стоило бы обратиться к нему. Но этот код я узнавала: слишком важно, чтобы врата оставались закрытыми". {n}Размашистыми движениями сенешаль набрасывает на странице записной книжки цифры кода и передает листок вам.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Общение с {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинными духами{/g} — забота магоса Экзальта-117, и вам стоило бы обратиться к нему. Но этот код я узнавала: слишком важно, чтобы врата оставались закрытыми". {n}Размашистыми движениями сенешаль набрасывает на странице записной книжки цифры кода и передает листок вам.{/n}

languages.text: "Communing with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} is the remit of Magos Exalt-117, and you would have done better to ask him. But I have memorised the code: it is too important that the gates remain closed." {n}With bold strokes, the Seneschal scribbles the code's digits on a page in her notebook and hands the paper to you.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Общение с {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинными духами{/g} — забота магоса Экзальта-117, и вам стоило бы обратиться к нему. "Communing with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} is the remit of Magos Exalt-117, and you would have done better to ask him. But I have memorised the code: it is too important that the gates remain closed." {n}With bold strokes, the Seneschal scribbles the code's digits on a page in her notebook and hands the paper to you.{/n}

languages.text: “与{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}沟通是贤者尊使-117的职责，你该去问他才是。不过我倒是记下了主控代码，那扇门必须保持紧闭，此事关系重大。”{n}总领干脆利落地在自己的笔记本上草草写下几位数字，然后将纸撕下来递给了你。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Communing with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} is the remit of Magos Exalt-117, and you would have done better to ask him. But I have memorised the code: it is too important that the gates remain closed." {n}With bold strokes, the Seneschal scribbles the code's digits on a page in her notebook and hands the paper to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “与{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}沟通是贤者尊使-117的职责，你该去问他才是。不过我倒是记下了主控代码，那扇门必须保持紧闭，此事关系重大。”{n}总领干脆利落地在自己的笔记本上草草写下几位数字，然后将纸撕下来递给了你。{/n}

languages.text: « C'est le travail du magos Exalt-117 que de communier avec les {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprits de la machine{/g}, et c'est à lui que vous auriez dû poser la question. Mais oui, j'ai mémorisé le code, tant il est vital que les portes demeurent fermées en permanence. » {n}La sénéchale griffonne à grands traits les chiffres qui composent le code sur une page de son carnet avant de vous la remettre.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Communing with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} is the remit of Magos Exalt-117, and you would have done better to ask him. But I have memorised the code: it is too important that the gates remain closed." {n}With bold strokes, the Seneschal scribbles the code's digits on a page in her notebook and hands the paper to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « C'est le travail du magos Exalt-117 que de communier avec les {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprits de la machine{/g}, et c'est à lui que vous auriez dû poser la question. Mais oui, j'ai mémorisé le code, tant il est vital que les portes demeurent fermées en permanence. » {n}La sénéchale griffonne à grands traits les chiffres qui composent le code sur une page de son carnet avant de vous la remettre.{/n}

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Makine ruhlarıyla{/g} iletişim kurmak, Magos Yüce-117'nin yetki alanındadır. Başta ona sormanız daha iyi olurdu. Ancak şifreyi ezberledim: Kapıların kapalı kalması ziyadesiyle önemli." {n}Seneşal, defterinden bir sayfaya sert vuruşlarla şifrenin rakamlarını karalıyor ve kâğıdı koparıp sana uzatıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Communing with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} is the remit of Magos Exalt-117, and you would have done better to ask him. But I have memorised the code: it is too important that the gates remain closed." {n}With bold strokes, the Seneschal scribbles the code's digits on a page in her notebook and hands the paper to you.{/n}

languages.text: «Comulgar con los {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritus máquina{/g} es jurisdicción del magos Exaltado-117, y sería mejor que le preguntara a él. Pero yo tengo el código memorizado: es crucial que las puertas permanezcan cerradas». {n}Con trazos gruesos, la Senescal garabatea los dígitos del código en una página de su cuaderno y te entrega la hoja.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Communing with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} is the remit of Magos Exalt-117, and you would have done better to ask him. But I have memorised the code: it is too important that the gates remain closed." {n}With bold strokes, the Seneschal scribbles the code's digits on a page in her notebook and hands the paper to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Comulgar con los {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritus máquina{/g} es jurisdicción del magos Exaltado-117, y sería mejor que le preguntara a él. Pero yo tengo el código memorizado: es crucial que las puertas permanezcan cerradas». {n}Con trazos gruesos, la Senescal garabatea los dígitos del código en una página de su cuaderno y te entrega la hoja.{/n}

languages.text: "Die Kommunikation mit {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeistern{/g} ist Aufgabe von Magos Exalt-117, und Ihr hättet gut daran getan, ihn zu fragen. Aber ich habe mir den Code gemerkt: Es ist zu wichtig, dass die Tore geschlossen bleiben." {n}Die Truchsessin kritzelt die Ziffern des Codes in ihr Notizbuch und reicht dir die Seite.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Communing with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} is the remit of Magos Exalt-117, and you would have done better to ask him. But I have memorised the code: it is too important that the gates remain closed." {n}With bold strokes, the Seneschal scribbles the code's digits on a page in her notebook and hands the paper to you.{/n}

languages.text: 「{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}機械霊{/g}との交信はマゴス・エクサルト117の任務であり、彼に尋ねた方がよかったでしょう。しかし、私はその暗号を暗記しています。ゲートが閉鎖されていることは非常に重要なのです。」{n}大胆な筆致で、執事長は暗号の数字をノートのページに書き込み、その紙をあなたに渡します。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Communing with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} is the remit of Magos Exalt-117, and you would have done better to ask him. But I have memorised the code: it is too important that the gates remain closed." {n}With bold strokes, the Seneschal scribbles the code's digits on a page in her notebook and hands the paper to you.{/n}
